patentcraft.screen.title: Patent Registry
patentcraft.message.not_authorized: This patented item must be authorized with its patent book first.
patentcraft.message.no_book: Hold a normal book to make a patent book.
patentcraft.message.no_patents: You do not have any patent books available.
patentcraft.message.profile_not_found: Could not find that player profile.
patentcraft.message.granted: Granted %s permission to make this patent book.
patentcraft.message.revoked: Revoked %s's permission to make this patent book.
patentcraft.message.owner_only: Only the first patent owner can manage this patent.
patentcraft.message.creative_only: Only creative-mode players can edit the patent whitelist.
patentcraft.message.station_empty: Put an item in the patent station first.
